query: UPDATE places SET type = 'dive_site' WHERE name IN ('Banana Reef', 'Dhigurah House Reef', 'Felidhoo Kandu', 'Fotteyo Kandu', 'Fulidhoo Kandu', 'Kandooma Thila', 'Maaya Thila', 'Thoddoo House Reef', 'Ukulhas House Reef');
